name: figma_rules
description: Generate a design system rule sheet from the current Figma file — aggregates color tokens, typography styles, variables (all modes), and component catalog into a single markdown block. Equivalent to official Figma MCP's create_design_system_rules. Call once at the start of a design-to-code session to give the AI full context: what tokens to use, what text styles exist, which components are available. Re-run when the design system changes.

sessionId.description: Target a specific Figma file/tab. Omit to auto-select.
